# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 521. Driver's Licenses & Certificates
##### § 521.0062 — Information on Driving with Autism

The department may make available, in a publicly accessible area of a driver’s license office, informational materials and videos on driving with autism that are developed by an appropriate entity, as determined by the department.

*Added by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 90 (H.B.1434), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2017.*
